rowLayout.rollMessage:
${#mod_null:= 0}$ ${#attack_modifier:= (equalText(item.attack_modifier, 'mod_null') ? mod_null : ref(item.attack_modifier))}$ ${#roll:=[!1d20]}$ ${#attack_bonus:=item.attack_bonus}$ ${#damage_modifier_1:= (equalText(item.damage_modifier_name_1, 'mod_null') ? mod_null : ref(item.damage_modifier_name_1))}$ ${#damage_modifier_2:= (equalText(item.damage_modifier_name_2, 'mod_null') ? mod_null : ref(item.damage_modifier_name_2))}$
${!item.name}$
${item.attack_check ? (${roll}$+attack_modifier+${item.attack_bm_check ? 'BM' : '0'}$+attack_bonus) : ''}$
${!item.attack_check ? '${!(roll >= item.critical_area) == true ? '
Крит!
' : (roll == 1 ? '
Крит провал!
' : '')}$' : ' '}$
${item.damage_1_check ? ([!${item.damage_formula_1}$]+item.damage_bonus_1+damage_modifier_1) : ''}$ ${item.damage_1_check ? item.damage_type_1 : ''}$
${item.damage_2_check ? ([!${item.damage_formula_2}$]+item.damage_bonus_2+damage_modifier_2) : ''}$ ${item.damage_2_check ? item.damage_type_2 : ''}$
${!item.action_description}$

${sameRow('name_possession')}$

Уровень владения: ${ sameRow('possession_mod') == 1 ? 'Нет' : (sameRow('possession_mod') == 2 ? 'Владение' : (sameRow('possession_mod')== 3 ? 'Мастерство' : '??')) }$ ${sameRow('Check_roll') ? [!1D20]+(sameRow('possession_mod') == 1 ? 0 : (sameRow('possession_mod') == 2 ? (BM) : (sameRow('possession_mod')== 3 ? (BM*2) : 0)))+((sameRow('skill_mod') == 1 ? mod_str : (sameRow('skill_mod') == 2 ? mod_dex : (sameRow('skill_mod')== 3 ? mod_con : (sameRow('skill_mod')== 4 ? mod_int : (sameRow('skill_mod')== 5 ? mod_wis : (sameRow('skill_mod')== 6 ? mod_cha : 0))))))) : 'Не требует броска'}$
